meaning: n.王权,王位的标志(如王冠等),(等级、社团等的)标记,徽章
examples: The Headmaster was dressed, as he nearly always was, in his full academic regalia.
The "Chiefs" dressed in the traditional attire of Plains Indians, not in Cherokee regalia.
The Norwegian diving platform "Regalia" at the scene of the sunken Kursk submarine in the Arctic Barents Sea on Sunday.
New York) and lavish interiors (including the Smoking Room replete with dandys in full Monopoly regalia!
Police have not yet been able to substantiate the reports of the alleged KKK regalia sighting.
